items.title: Braga v Nottingham Forest, Rangers v Ludogorets, and more: Europa League – live
items.summary: ⚽ Europa League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-offs ⚽ Live scores | Table | Follow us on Bluesky | Mail John Good evening, and it’s the Thursday club. Nottingham Forest have chance to nail down their hopes of making the knockout rounds, while Rangers need to win their last two matches to have any hope whatsoever of rescuing a grim campaign; it’s unlikely they will able to make it but perhaps pride can restored. We’ll also start with the latest from the earlier kick-offs, with Aston Villa and Celtic in action. And full coverage of the 8pm kick-offs across Europe. Join me. Continue reading...

items.title: VI Live: Feyenoord met minimale voorsprong de rust in
items.summary: Welkom in VI Live van donderdag 22 januari. De Europa League gaat na een korte onderbreking weer verder. Feyenoord ontvangt in de eigen Kuip Sturm Graz, FC Utrecht neemt het op tegen RC Genk en Go Ahead reist af naar Frankrijk voor het treffen met OGC Nice.

items.title: NAC-talent Valerius: 'Ik laat me bij deze mooie club niet wegjagen'
items.summary: Cherrion Valerius (20) geniet volop interesse van clubs uit het buitenland. De rechtsback van NAC Breda wordt door zijn club al naar de uitgang gedrukt, maar blijft zelf stoïcijns. Het talent uit de eigen jeugdopleiding richt zich vooral op de naderende clash met PSV.

items.title: Casemiro to leave Man United at end of the season
items.summary: Casemiro will leave Manchester United when his contract expires at the end of the season, the club have confirmed.

items.title: MLS extends transfer window to align with Europe
items.summary: The MLS summer transfer window, also known as the secondary window, will extend into September for the 2026 season, continuing an ongoing push by the league to align with the schedule of global soccer.

items.title: L'pool top English club in Money League; Utd fall
items.summary: Real Madrid topped the latest Deloitte Football Money League rankings, generating a record €1.2 billion ($1.4 billion) in revenue, with the top 20 teams represented clearing €12.4 billion ($14.5 billion) when combined, also a record.

items.title: Dzeko, 39, returns to Germany with eye on WC
items.summary: Edin Dzeko has returned to Germany where he hopes to play more to help Bosnia and Herzegovina earn a World Cup ticket.

items.title: Supporters van Real Valladolid moeten geduld hebben met Ohio
items.summary: Noah Ohio komt zaterdag nog niet in actie voor Real Valladolid. Het thuisduel met Albacete komt te vroeg voor de winteraanwinst. 'Over een week ben ik fris voor de volgende wedstrijd.'

items.title: Midfielder Casemiro to leave Man Utd this summer
items.summary: Manchester United say midfielder Casemiro will leave the club when his contract expires at the end of this season.

items.title: Van Persie fan van St. Juste: 'Ik weet wat voor een persoon hij is'
items.summary: Kort voor de wedstrijd tegen Sturm Graz maakte Feyenoord bekend dat het Jeremiah St. Juste binnen heeft gehaald, trainer Robin van Persie kon er daardoor op reageren richting het Europa League-duel.

items.title: Voetbal op tv: hier kijk je naar Europa League-duel Feyenoord met Sturm Graz
items.summary: Donderdagavond staat voor Feyenoord de zevende wedstrijd in de competitiefase van de Europa League op het programma. De Rotterdammers nemen het in eigen huis op tegen het Oostenrijkse Sturm Graz. In dit artikel lees je waar deze wedstrijd wordt uitgezonden.

items.title: Forest close in on Napoli striker Lucca
items.summary: Nottingham Forest are closing in on the signing of Napoli striker Lorenzo Lucca.

items.title: Casemiro to leave Manchester United in summer, Chelsea want Douglas Luiz
items.summary: United midfielder, 34 next month, out of contract Juventus’s Douglas Luiz on loan at Nottingham Forest Casemiro will leave Manchester United when his contract expires in the summer after the club decided not to trigger a one-year extension. United have chosen to part ways at this point to allow time to shape their summer transfer strategy. There is an eagerness to refresh the midfield as part of a squad overhaul, the ambition being to recruit younger players for the long term. Continue reading...

items.title: Football Daily | Manchester United the TV show? Bring on the Battle of the Buffet
items.summary: Sign up now! Sign up now! Sign up now? Sign up now! The last time Manchester United tried to milk a few extra million quid, last summer, the club embarked on an ill-timed and ill-thought out post-season tour of Asia, which quickly turned into a PR farce. The 1-0 defeat against the “Asean All Stars”, a scratch, invitational side that had never previously played together, didn’t help but the tour was plagued by their fatigued, uninterested players looking utterly fed up, some of them sulking, yawning and even sticking their middle fingers up at fans who had come out to watch them play. Around £8m-£10m was estimated to have been generated, but at what cost? Continue reading...

items.title: Casemiro to leave Man Utd this summer
items.summary: Casemiro will leave Manchester United at the end of the season upon the expiry of his current deal at Old Trafford.

items.title: France's Flament to miss Ireland Six Nations Test for wife's fertility treatment
items.summary: France lock Thibaud Flament will miss their opening Test of the 2026 Six Nations against Ireland in order to attend his wife's fertility treatment appointment.

items.title: Sutton's predictions v 'Roy Keane' - Saipan star Hardwicke
items.summary: BBC Sport football expert Chris Sutton takes on actor Éanna Hardwicke, who plays Roy Keane in the new film Saipan - and AI - with his predictions for this week's Premier League fixtures.

items.title: Heated Rivalry stars to carry Olympic Torch ahead of Winter Games
items.summary: The stars of Heated Rivalry will be torchbearers during the Olympic Torch Relay ahead of the opening ceremony of the Winter Games in Milan next month.

items.title: Leicester sign Switzerland forward Alisha Lehmann from FC Como
items.summary: Club continues January push for experienced players Kelly Gago wants to leave Everton, says Brian Sørensen Leicester have signed the Switzerland forward Alisha Lehmann from FC Como. The WSL club have been targeting experienced players this month, having often had the youngest average age in the division in their starting XI this season. Lehmann, who has played in England’s top flight for West Ham, Everton and Aston Villa, has 64 caps and was part of the Swiss squad at Euro 2025. She has signed a contract to 2028. “It feels like a homecoming, coming back to England, and I’m really happy,” she said. Continue reading...

items.title: A World Cup boycott over Trump? Football’s hypotheticals cannot be dismissed any more | Nick Ames
items.summary: Unprecedented times call for previously unthinkable conversations when it comes to the US-shaped problem Could European countries really decide to boycott the World Cup this summer? It is an astonishing question to be asking in 2026 and an indictment of the bind in which, as Donald Trump sows confusion around a potential annexation of Greenland, the world’s most popular sport finds itself. But the idea is at least seeping into the mainstream and senior figures are asking what, in a worst-case scenario, it would take for football to meet the moment. Unprecedented times call for previously unthinkable conversations. As the Guardian reported this week, an anniversary party for the Hungarian FA on Monday became the forum for unofficial discussions among national association heads about how a unified approach to the US-shaped problem might take shape. Continue reading...
